name: Cynwell Liao
title: AI Software Engineer
tagline: Building production backend systems and event-driven RAG pipelines with reliability, velocity, and observability.

about.intro: I work at the intersection of AI reliability and cloud infrastructure, turning complex systems into practical product outcomes.
paragraphs: Currently pursuing a Master of Information Technology at the University of Melbourne with a focus on computing, supported by a strong foundation in business from a Bachelor of Business at QUT. Gained additional skills in project management through a short-term exchange program at Harvard University and certifications, including the AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Associate and Google IT Automation with Python Professional Certificate.

As a Data Analytics Teaching Assistant at TibaMe, mentor learners in data analytics and visualization with tools like Power BI and SQL Server, focusing on problem-solving and workflow optimization. Recently contributed as an AI Software Engineer Intern at Startupbootcamp, developing RAG pipelines and streamlining data synchronization using React, Node.js, and TypeScript. Skilled in software development, solution architecture, and project management, with a focus on delivering reliable, user-driven solutions.
